description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Windows (Qt 5, x86) that runs on a workflow dispatch. In a single windows-latest job, check out the repository, cache and install Qt 5.15.2 for win32_msvc2019, configure CMake with Visual Studio 16 2019, build the project in Release mode, package it with windeployqt, copy OpenSSL DLLs, and upload the resulting artifact.
